display.purpose: Home hero only; weight creates confidence without font novelty.

headline.purpose: Page-level titles and major empty states.

title.purpose: Section headings, dialog headings, and card titles.

body.purpose: Dense readable product copy and helper text.

metric.purpose: Exact quantities, prices, and count summaries.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card and summary surface lift.

shadows.name: action-depth
shadows.value: inset 0 0.5px 0 0.5px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), 0 3px 2px -2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 70%), 0 4px 3px -2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 70%)
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons and active claret controls.

shadows.name: foil-moment
shadows.value: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 44%, transparent), 0 12px 30px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.28), 0 0 26px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 28%, transparent)

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, nav, chip, and field state feedback.

motion.name: home-intro
motion.purpose: The existing home hero entrance; do not generalize to every page.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Foil shimmer and decorative motion must stop under reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Claret action control for committed primary work.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1.5px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), black 10%); border-radius: var(--radius-field, 4px); background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-primary-content); font: 700 14px/20px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; box-shadow: inset 0 0.5px 0 0.5px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), 0 3px 2px -2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 70%), 0 4px 3px -2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 70%); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), black 8%); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 35%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-risk action or icon/nav control that stays quiet until hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-field, 4px); background: transparent; color: var(--color-base-content); font: 700 14px/20px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-base-200); color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 35%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Bordered vault field for search, filters, and forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1.5px solid var(--color-base-300); border-radius: var(--radius-field, 4px); background: var(--color-base-100); color: var(--color-base-content); font: 400 16px/24px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-base-content), transparent 98%); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-base-content), transparent 45%); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--color-primary); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 80%); }

components.name: Active Navigation Pill
components.description: Compact current-route marker in the top navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 36px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), var(--color-base-100) 18%); color: var(--color-primary-content); font: 700 14px/20px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: var(--color-primary); } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 35%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outlined Badge
components.description: Small semantic status/count label that remains readable in dense views.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(--color-primary); border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-primary); font: 500 12px/16px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Vault Card
components.description: Tactile but disciplined container for summaries and action cards.
components.html:
Collection

Browse boxes, binders, lists, and unfiled cards.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 24px; border: 1.5px solid var(--color-base-300); border-radius: var(--radius-box, 8px); background: var(--color-base-100); color: var(--color-base-content); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10); transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font: 900 24px/29px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 12px 0 0; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-base-content), transparent 30%); font: 400 16px/24px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), transparent 60%); transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Dialog Surface
components.description: Portal-backed edit/confirmation surface with strong modal separation.
components.html:
Edit card

Update quantity, location, and finish.
components.css: .ds-dialog { width: min(560px, 100%); padding: 20px; border: 1.5px solid var(--color-base-300); border-radius: var(--radius-box, 8px); background: var(--color-base-100); color: var(--color-base-content); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.25); } .ds-dialog h2 { margin: 0; font: 900 20px/24px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-base-content), transparent 30%); font: 400 16px/24px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: ManaVault's visual system treats the app as a secure, tactile workspace for real cardboard. It uses a claret vault cube, muted storage-surface layers, compact system type, and small-radius controls to make inventory feel physical without turning the interface into game-store decoration. The product should feel collector-grade and confident: dense enough for expert collection work, calm enough for backup and allocation decisions, and touch-friendly enough for the PWA/native shell. It explicitly rejects generic hosted-SaaS dashboards, growth-product landing-page tropes, loud TCG marketplace clutter, over-saturated novelty treatment, and thin cloud-app minimalism.
keyCharacteristics: Claret is the ownership/action color; it is strong, rare, and intentional.
Surfaces are layered like storage trays: base, panel, line, content.
Type is one disciplined system sans, with mono reserved for values and inventory numbers.
Components are tactile but disciplined: 4px fields, 8px cards, clear borders, modest lift.
Motion is product-state feedback, not page choreography.

rules.name: The Claret Rarity Rule
rules.body: Claret marks action, selection, and ownership; if it appears on inactive decoration, the screen loses trust.

rules.name: The No Game-Store Chaos Rule
rules.body: Brass, grove, foil shimmer, and card art must support state or card identity. They are forbidden as generic excitement.

rules.name: The One-Sans Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display fonts for UI labels, buttons, tables, or forms. Product trust comes from consistent type, not type novelty.

rules.name: The Lift Means Affordance Rule
rules.body: If a shadow is not explaining hover, modal focus, primary action, or foil material, remove it and use a tonal layer instead.

dos: Do keep claret rare and meaningful: primary action, active route, selected state, ownership emphasis.
Do preserve the tactile vault language with 4px fields, 8px cards, 1.5px borders, and small structural shadows.
Do use mono type for exact values, prices, quantities, and counts where auditability matters.
Do make mobile/PWA flows first-class: safe-area padding, 44px touch targets, full-height mobile dialogs, and persistent navigation clarity.
Do meet WCAG AA contrast, visible keyboard focus, reduced-motion alternatives, and non-color-only status communication.
donts: Don't make ManaVault look like generic hosted-SaaS dashboards or growth-product landing-page tropes.
Don't create loud TCG marketplace clutter, over-saturated novelty treatment, or game-store chaos.
Don't turn claret, brass, foil gradients, or card art into generic decoration.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, or identical icon-card grids as default scaffolding.
Don't over-round product surfaces; cards stop at 8px unless a control is deliberately pill-shaped.
